author: potuz
content:
I got a silly question. Is there a crypto primitive that takes a post quantum secure private key and returns a pair of private/public algorithms.  The private algorithm takes as input a random string and returns a sec/public pair of keys that is not quantum secure. The public algorithm only shows the public output of the private one.

The public algorithm can be revealed some time in advance of revealing signed messages with the insecure keys. As long as this time is not too long then the messages are also PQ safe. 

I guess the question I'm asking is why do we want PQ secure signing of attestations in the hot path for lean Ethereum instead of searching for a quantum secure way of revealing insecure keys with some anticipation?
